---
title: "dragAndDrop"
description: "Drag and drop an element from source to target."
---

<!-- Generated by docs/.scripts/buildSchemaReferencesV4.js. Do not edit by hand;
     update the schema in src/common and run `npm run docs:build-schema-refs`. -->

Drag and drop an element from source to target.

## Referenced In

- [Markup definition](/reference/schemas/markup-definition)
- [test](/reference/schemas/test)
- [Resolved context](/reference/schemas/resolved-context)

## Fields

Field | Type | Description | Default
:-- | :-- | :-- | :--
source | one of:<br/>- string<br/>- object([Element (detailed)](/reference/schemas/element-detailed)) | Required. The element to drag. | 
target | one of:<br/>- string<br/>- object([Element (detailed)](/reference/schemas/element-detailed)) | Required. The target location to drop the element. | 
duration | integer | Optional. Duration of the drag operation in milliseconds.<br/><br/>Minimum: 0 | `1000`

## Examples

```json
{
  "source": "Table",
  "target": "#canvas"
}
```

```json
{
  "source": ".draggable-block",
  "target": ".drop-zone",
  "duration": 2000
}
```

```json
{
  "source": {
    "selector": ".widget",
    "elementText": "Data Table"
  },
  "target": {
    "selector": "#design-canvas"
  },
  "duration": 500
}
```

```json
{
  "source": {
    "selector": ".draggable",
    "timeout": 10000
  },
  "target": {
    "elementText": "Drop Zone",
    "timeout": 5000
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "source": "/Widget Item.*/",
  "target": "#canvas"
}
```

```json
{
  "source": {
    "selector": ".draggable",
    "elementText": "/Button [0-9]+/"
  },
  "target": {
    "elementText": "/Drop Zone.*/"
  }
}
```
